prompt: Describe the image in three to five sentences. Be objective and specific. Mention the main subject, relevant objects, setting, and visible actions or relationships. Do not add opinions or information that cannot be inferred from the image.

baseline.caption_ref: The woman is holding a Hello Kitty cell phone while looking at it closely. She appears focused on her device as she interacts with it.
baseline.free_caption: The woman is holding a Hello Kitty cell phone while looking at it closely. She appears focused on her device as she interacts with it.

sparc.caption_ref: The woman is holding a Hello Kitty cell phone while looking at it closely. She appears focused on her device as she interacts with it.
sparc.free_caption: The woman is holding a Hello Kitty cell phone while looking at it with an expression of confusion on her face. She has two other phones nearby, one closer to the left side of the scene and another further away towards the right. There are also several people around her, some standing close by and others farther back in the scene.

notes: kl / cos_dist matrices live in metrics.parquet (one row per condition).
